description: The Size Multiplier By Velocity component is used in Photon Dust systems to make particles change size on any given axies based on velocity.

fields.VelocityMultiplier: The amount to multiply velocity of a particle by before using it as a multiplier.
fields.VelocityMask: Which axies should be included in or excluded from this scaling effect.
fields.MultiplierClampMin: the minimum value to clamp the current velocity of a particle to before it is used as a scale multiplier.
fields.MultiplierClampMax: the maximum value to clamp the current velocity of a particle to before it is used as a scale multiplier.
fields.ResultClampMin: the minimum scale the particle is allowed to be as a final scale.
fields.ResultClampMax: the maximum scale the particle is allowed to be as a final scale.

usage: Used in particle systems to change particle size by velocity.
